title: MedGuard-AI Patient Input Schema
description: Schema defining the structure of patient data submitted to the MedGuard-AI agentic clinical decision-support pipeline.

patient_id.description: Unique identifier for the patient record.

age.description: Age of the patient in years.

symptoms.description: Free-text list of symptoms currently reported by the patient. The reasoning agent performs fuzzy matching against the canonical 132-symptom vocabulary.

medical_history.description: List of past or chronic conditions the patient has been diagnosed with. Used by the causal verification engine for contraindication analysis.

name.description: Generic or brand name of the medication.

current_medications.description: List of medications the patient is currently taking. Used for drug-drug interaction analysis.

allergies.description: List of known drug or substance allergies. Checked against the proposed treatment by the contraindication module.
